source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A basement is flooded with 16 m^3 of water at 15\circ\text{C}. It is pumped out with a small pump driven by a 0.75 kW electric motor. The hose should have a velocity of 20 m/s at that point generated by a nozzle. How fast the basement can be emptied?
